title: Multicultural Atmosphere
content:
Multicultural Atmosphere

One-fifth of the students of Istanbul 29 Mayıs University are international students. The university, which offers an opportunity of education in a multicultural and international environment, currently has 154 students from 36 different countries including Afghanistan, Indonesia, Congo, Sudan, Azerbaijan, Turkmenistan and Bosnia and Herzegovina.
